narrative:
Crooksville Ex Vill Sd (Perry) exempted village school district has 3,098 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a clear Republican lean of 11.4 percentage points.
